scripts.package:desktop: turbo run build --filter=@supernova/server && turbo run package:unpack --filter=@supernova/desktop --
scripts.package:desktop:win: turbo run build --filter=@supernova/server && turbo run package:win --filter=@supernova/desktop --
scripts.package:desktop:mac: turbo run build --filter=@supernova/server && turbo run package:mac --filter=@supernova/desktop --
scripts.package:desktop:linux: turbo run build --filter=@supernova/server && turbo run package:linux --filter=@supernova/desktop --
scripts.lint: turbo run lint && bun run lint:scripts
scripts.prettier: turbo run prettier && bun run prettier:scripts
scripts.typecheck: turbo run typecheck && bun run typecheck:scripts
